title: Ethiopian Cod Wot
description: A flavorful Ethiopian-inspired fish stew made with cod, aromatic spices, and a hint of salt.

ingredients.name: Ethiopian red pepper spice (berbere)
ingredients.notes: Available at most African or Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Ethiopian doro spice
ingredients.notes: Available at most African or Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cod and cook until browned on both sides.
Add the doro spice and water, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the fish is cooked through.
